codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the prior failure by substituting Self to the concrete type when associated functions are referenced as values in check_path, and by allowing enum type paths to fall through to associated-function lookup when the member is not a variant. Regression tests now cover both struct and enum stored associated-function values followed by method calls on the returned instance.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature handoff, transcript skeleton, compiler-worker skill, and both commit diffs. The new check_path logic now materializes concrete Self types for stored associated-function values and handles enum associated-function paths, so the previously failing pattern let make = Status::default; make().is_active() is covered and the original scrutiny failure is resolved.
